Descriptions.ShortDescription: Astro PM connects your cloud-hosted imaging projects to NINA. Set up your sync token to link your account, browse and load targets directly into the Framing Assistant, or use the built-in Simulator to generate a fully automated nightly schedule.
Descriptions.LongDescription:
Astro PM is a cloud-based astrophotography project manager. This plugin connects NINA to your Astro PM account with three core capabilities:

**Connect** — Link your account by entering your sync token. Once connected, your cloud-hosted projects and targets are available inside NINA automatically.

**Browse & Frame** — Browse your cloud targets and load them directly into NINA's Framing Assistant — complete with RA/Dec, rotation, sensor configuration, and mosaic panel layouts. No manual data entry, no copy-paste errors.

**Simulate & Automate (Beta)** — Use the built-in Nightly Simulator to generate a fully automated imaging schedule. The simulator considers target altitude, transit times, and your equipment profile to build an optimized sequence — then hands it off to NINA for hands-free capture.

Includes four NINA sequence modules:
- Astro PM Daily Loop — Loops night-to-night while projects have remaining exposures
- Astro PM Nightly Loop — Loops through tonight's scheduled target blocks
- Astro PM Instructions — The core engine: slew, center, rotate, guide, filter switch, dither, and capture
- Refresh Cloud Targets — Fetches the latest targets from your cloud account

Requirements:
- N.I.N.A. 3.0.0.9001 or newer
- Valid Astro PM license (https://astro-pm.com)
